user.name: Grishin Robotics
user.description: Grishin Robotics is one of the leading venture firms to focus exclusively on hardware and robotics companies, investing out of its second $100M fund.

tweets.text:
Trussed AI just raised an undisclosed strategic investment from Nassau Financial Group and is hiring.

The Saratoga company is building an AI control plane for regulated enterprises - the layer between business apps, agents, and models where policies can be enforced before https://t.co/eLRwteQAr3

tweets.text:

tweets.text:

tweets.text:
reltix just raised €3M and is hiring.

Tenity backed the pre-seed round as the Düsseldorf startup crossed €1M ARR in less than a year on the market.

The interesting part is not another dashboard for property managers. reltix is running the property-management service itself, https://t.co/rKiOf8Lf7T

tweets.text:
